case_title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY VS KOHLER, PETER DBA SOUTH CITY TOW

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $534.72 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT KOHLER, PETER DBA SOUTH CITY TOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
